events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes copper piping that was cut but not reamed, leaving a visible burr. This is a defect because burrs restrict flow, cause turbulence, and can trap debris. IPC requires reaming of pipe ends after cutting. This is non-compliant at rough-complete stage.
